## Summary

Brief description of what this PR does.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (corrects skill behavior)
- [ ] New feature (adds new capability)
- [ ] Refactor (restructures without changing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation (updates docs/examples only)
- [ ] New skill (adds a new aidlc-* skill)

## Skills Affected

List skills modified (e.g., aidlc-design, aidlc-tasks).

## Validation

- [ ] Ran `scripts/validate.sh` — all checks pass
- [ ] Tested the affected skill(s) in Kiro or Claude Code
- [ ] Updated documentation if behavior changed
- [ ] Updated example (todo-app) if output format changed

## Breaking Changes

Does this change the manifest format, artifact paths, or decision gate structure?
If yes, describe the migration path.

## Notes

Any context for reviewers (design decisions, tradeoffs, things you're unsure about).
